beats.description: Hero walks in, crosses to the counter and takes the stool; bartender polishes a glass. Sparse opening exchange.

dialogue.text: Always is. Right up until it isn't.

beats.description: Bartender reads the hero, pours a drink unasked.

dialogue.text: You look like a man who came here to not talk about it.
First one's on the house, then.

beats.description: Hero concedes with dry humor; bartender leans in, the ice broken.

dialogue.text: Only to bartenders and dogs, friend.
